title: microsoft/SkillOpt
friendlyTitle: SkillOpt helps agents learn reusable skills from past work
summary: SkillOpt is a Microsoft research project for improving frozen LLM agents by optimizing reusable natural-language skills from trajectories, validation gates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts. The repository is trending with roughly 11.6k stars and a recent v0.2.0 release focused on SkillOpt-Sleep and cross-tool backends.
friendlySummary: SkillOpt is a Microsoft project that turns agent experience into improved natural-language skills.
whyItMatters: Agent builders can study it as a concrete pattern for turning past runs into reusable skills rather than only tweaking prompts by hand. The sleep-style offline improvement loop is especially relevant for teams building agents that should get better from logged experience.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you build agents, this can show how to make them improve from their own history instead of starting fresh every time.
